text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes things like understanding language, recognizing images, and making decisions. Machine learning is a key part of AI where computers learn from data instead of being programmed step-by-step. Deep learning, a more advanced type of machine learning, uses complex networks to process information, similar to the human brain. AI is already used in daily life, from virtual assistants like Siri to recommendation systems on streaming services. It also helps with online shopping, navigation apps, and even email spam filters, making many tasks faster and easier.
